title: ADDICTION SERVICES - 211info
text: NORTH BEND ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders. Services include medical detox, residential care, day treatment, outpatient treatment, after care, and medication-assisted treatment. Provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. 400 Virginia Avenue Suite 201 North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Most services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Medication-assisted treatment: 7 days per week 6:30am-2:30pm, by appointment only (541) 492-0200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 492-0200 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans, Oregon Health Plan, and Medicare. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Medication-assisted treatment: Coos County All other services: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH BEND
